title: Toyota Vehicle Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for the Toyota Connected Services Vehicle resource

fields.name: vin
fields.description: Vehicle Identification Number, exactly 17 characters, alphanumeric (I, O, Q excluded)

fields.name: model
fields.description: Vehicle model name (e.g., Camry, Prius, RAV4, Tacoma, bZ4X)

fields.name: trim
fields.description: Trim/grade level (e.g., LE, XLE, Limited, TRD)

fields.name: guid
fields.description: User GUID associated with the vehicle account

fields.name: isConnected
fields.description: Whether the vehicle is actively connected to Toyota services

fields.name: lastConnectedAt
fields.description: Last datetime the vehicle successfully connected to Toyota services
